commit.message:
fix: UX improvements — replace alerts with toasts, mobile scroll, rate-limit handling, session lifetime

- Replace all alert() calls with showToast() for non-blocking feedback
- Surface backend validation errors in save toast messages
- Add save button disable during config POST to prevent double-clicks
- Improve mobile BT table scroll with fade hint and smaller min-widths
- Add GitHub API rate-limit header handling in update checker
- Handle HTTP 403 rate-limit responses gracefully with warning log
- Set explicit 24h session lifetime with PERMANENT_SESSION_LIFETIME

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add CHECK_UPDATES toggle to disable automatic update checks

commit.message:
Fix flaky DenoKV tests: null safety in queries, cleanup index deletion bug, retry backoff (#8043)

* Initial plan

* Fix flaky denokv tests: null safety in queries, fix cleanup index deletion, add retry backoff

- Fix ensureNotFalsy crash in queryDenoKV when document data is null due to
  race between index read and document fetch (denokv-query.ts lines 87, 109)
- Fix cleanup index deletion bug: was using raw docId instead of indexed string,
  leaving orphaned index entries that caused subsequent query failures
- Add backoff delay to retryUntilNoWriteInBetween to prevent CPU spinning
- Add backoff delay to _bulkWrite retry loop on failed atomic commits
- Increase commitWithRetry max attempts from 3 to 10 with larger backoff
- Fix nested retryUntilNoWriteInBetween in count method

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

* Use promiseWait instead of raw setTimeout in retry loops

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add DenoKV cleanup fix to 17.0.0 release notes

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(process): add ProcessLinker, ProcessGraphRag, and module docs

Add two new components to the src/process/ Graph-RAG layer for German
administrative proceedings (Verwaltungsvorgänge):

ProcessLinker (include/process/process_linker.h + src/process/process_linker.cpp)
- Typed attachment of documents/metadata to process instances via 8
  ProcessLinkType values (HAS_DOCUMENT, HAS_METADATA, REQUIRES_DOCUMENT,
  IS_INSTANCE_OF, SUB_PROCESS, CROSS_REFERENCE, TRIGGERS, EVIDENCE_FOR)
- Process-to-process linking with persistent ProcessLink records
- Required-document registry per model node (proc:req_doc: prefix)
- Missing-document detection by cross-referencing registry vs attachments
- Soft-delete tombstone pattern for detachObject()
- Full RocksDB scanPrefix-based retrieval for getAttachments(), getLinks()

ProcessGraphRag (include/process/process_graph_rag.h + src/process/process_graph_rag.cpp)
- buildKnowledgeGraph(): converts ProcessModelRecord.normalized nodes/edges
  to KGNode/KGEdge objects (themis::rag::kg) for KnowledgeGraphRetriever
- buildInstanceKnowledgeGraph(): adds instance-state, token, and attachment
  nodes to the model knowledge graph
- extractSubgraph(): BFS subgraph extraction up to configurable depth
- retrieve() / retrieveForNode(): full context assembly orchestrating
  instance state, subgraph, attachments, missing docs, similar cases, prompt
- summarizeVerwaltungsvorgang(): structured JSON summary (state, progress %,
  SLA status, compliance, attachments count, missing documents, variables)
- checkCompliance(): checks required-document presence, SLA adherence, state
- findSimilarCases(): cosine similarity over proc:inst_emb: embeddings with
  Jaccard variable-key fallback when no embeddings are stored
- buildAdminProcessingPrompt(): German Verwaltungsvorgang prompt in structured
  format with aktuelle Aufgaben, Verlauf, fehlende Unterlagen, Compliance, SLA
- Full ProcessRagConfig with 9 tuning parameters including language de/en

Documentation:
- src/process/ARCHITECTURE.md: component diagram, data model, key scheme,
  indexing strategy, Graph-RAG pattern, process linking model, admin config
- src/process/ROADMAP.md: versioned roadmap (phases 1-6, short/long-term items)
- src/process/FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md: 7 planned features with design
  constraints, required interfaces, implementation notes, test strategy
- src/process/CHANGELOG.md: v1.0.0 changelog
- include/process/README.md: API reference, quick-start example, AQL examples

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
perf: optimize bulk insert hot path (#8037)

* Initial plan

* perf: optimize bulk insert performance

- Replace Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call() with faster 'in' operator in fillObjectDataBeforeInsert
- Inline getDefaultRxDocumentMeta() and getDefaultRevision() to avoid function call overhead
- Replace hasOwnProperty with direct undefined check in fillObjectWithDefaults
- Optimize wrapped bulkWrite insert path: skip _meta clone and pre-compute first revision
- Use counter-based event bulk IDs instead of randomToken() in categorizeBulkWriteRows

commit.message:
docs(api): comprehensive FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md from source analysis

Rewrote src/api/FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md after reading every .cpp/.h file
in src/api/ and include/api/.  All new open items are grounded in specific
file:function observations:

- GrpcApiServer::start()/stop() hold mutex_ across blocking operations
  (BuildAndStart, Shutdown without deadline) — grpc_server.cpp
- Six UNIMPLEMENTED gRPC stubs in themisdb_grpc_service.cpp:
  ExecuteAQL, StreamAQL, VectorSearch, FilteredVectorSearch,
  HybridSearch, FullTextSearch
- Hard-coded version=1 in CreateDocument/UpdateDocument responses
- BatchWrite non-atomic partial failures + missing bounds checks
- OtlpExporter creates a new CURL* per flush batch and uses O(n)
  std::vector dequeue — otlp_exporter.cpp
- ResponseCache::invalidatePattern() TODO: always clears entire cache
  instead of collection-scoped eviction — graphql_cache.h:290
- RateLimiter buckets_ grows unbounded; nested mutex chain under
  OperationRateLimiter — rate_limiter.h
- AuditLogger::log() holds mutex_ during slow handler callbacks
  — audit_logger.h
- GraphQL Parser missing Fragments/Directives/Inline fragments support
  (documented in graphql.h as 'Not yet supported')
- Parser::error() documented as deprecated but not yet removed
- Schema::introspect() incomplete (missing __typename, __Field, etc.)
- Executor::executeSelections() serial field resolution
- Raw self* captured in CDC callback lambda — graphql_ws_handler.cpp
- WsChangeHandler query-string parsing lacks URL-decoding — ws_handler.cpp
- QueryAllowList disabled by default, no production-mode warning
- IGRPCBridge pure-virtual with no concrete implementation — grpc_bridge.h

All existing [x] items from the previous version are preserved.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs(analytics): rewrite FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md from full source analysis

Replace the previous generic template with a 609-line, 17-section document
derived from reading all 12 analytics .cpp and .h files.

Key issues captured with exact file:line references:
- analytics_export.cpp:728 – ExporterFactory always returns StubAnalyticsExporter (6 stubs)
- cep_engine.cpp:1082 – user callback invoked while windows_mutex_ held
- cep_engine.cpp:2403 – metricsLoop() bare sleep_for blocks fast shutdown
- anomaly_detection.cpp:1051 – O(N²) train() called under mu_ in process()
- model_serving.cpp:206 – predictOne() runs under registry shared_lock
- ml_serving.cpp:178/190 – TOCTOU double-lock + ONNX inference under global mutex
- incremental_view.cpp:325 – unique_lock held across entire batch in applyChanges()
- llm_process_analyzer.cpp:105 – O(N) LRU eviction loop under cache_mutex
- distributed_analytics.cpp:321 – network isHealthy() called under mutex_
- diff_engine.cpp:181 – cache stampede + O(N) full changefeed scan
- automl.cpp:833 – KNNRegressorModel::predictOneReg() stub returns 0.0
- cep_engine.cpp:140 – computePercentile takes vector by value (80KB copy)
- olap.cpp:53 / process_mining.cpp:24 – Windows stubs with silent return false
- streaming_window.cpp – 8 open TODOs; 200/500ms hard-coded poll intervals

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs(acceleration): rewrite FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md from full source audit

Thoroughly re-analyzed every .cpp, .cu, .hip, and .h file in
src/acceleration/ and include/acceleration/ to produce a comprehensive,
code-grounded enhancement document.

New issues documented from actual source code:
- nccl_vector_backend.cpp:435 / rccl_vector_backend.cpp:435: mergeTopK()
  distributed stub (worldSize > 1 always returns false)
- plugin_security.cpp:598,654: checkCRL() and checkOCSP() stub methods
- plugin_security.cpp:1092: PE certificate table extraction unimplemented
- vllm_resource_manager.cpp:136,139: getStats() OS monitoring not implemented
- vllm_resource_manager.cpp:178: NVML always monitors GPU index 0 only
- cuda/cuda_hnsw_kernels.cu:325: kMaxK=256 silently clamps k
- cuda/cuda_hnsw_kernels.cu:330: per-launch cudaMalloc for visited bitset
- Hard-coded block sizes 256 across CUDA/HIP kernel launchers
- backend_registry.cpp: std::cout instead of structured logger macros
- BackendRegistry: no mutex protection on backends_ / selectedVectorBackend_
- selectTyped<T>() O(n^2) with dynamic_cast per iteration
- tensor_core_matmul.cpp: INT8 precision case missing, UB fall-through
- faiss_gpu_backend.cpp: missing IVF_SQ8, FLAT, HNSW index types
- graphics_backends.cpp: OpenGL backend has 5 remaining stubs
- vulkan/shaders/l2_distance.comp: local_size hard-coded, not specialization const

Preserved all existing [x] completed items and restored citation markers.

feat(observability): instrument core orchestration paths with OTel spans

Add OpenTelemetry spans to all 9 core orchestration services per §10.13.2:
- task.transition in TransitionService
- task.assign in SchedulerService
- worker.prepare/worker.run in WorkerSupervisorService
- worker.heartbeat in HeartbeatService
- validation.run in ValidationRunnerService
- review.route in ReviewRouterService
- review.lead_decision in ReviewDecisionService
- merge.prepare/merge.execute in MergeExecutorService

Create span name and attribute key constants in @factory/observability.
Add 14 span verification tests. Re-export SpanStatusCode, Span, and
InMemorySpanExporter from the observability package.

commit.message:
feat(control-plane): implement artifact and review packet retrieval endpoints

Add REST endpoints for retrieving task artifacts, review history,
review cycle packets, parsed packet content, and merge details.

Endpoints:
- GET /tasks/:taskId/artifacts - artifact tree organized by type
- GET /tasks/:taskId/packets/:packetId - parsed JSON packet content
- GET /tasks/:taskId/reviews - review cycle history with decisions
- GET /tasks/:taskId/reviews/:cycleId/packets - specialist packets
- GET /tasks/:taskId/merge - merge queue item + validation runs

New files:
- review/artifacts.controller.ts + artifacts.service.ts
- review/reviews.controller.ts + reviews.service.ts
- merge/merge-details.controller.ts + merge-details.service.ts
- 6 test files with 31 new tests (3,268 total passing)

Closes T084.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Make PRD shovel-ready: add algorithms, formulas, intelligence primitives

Shovel-readiness fixes:
- DID generation step-by-step algorithm (Ed25519 -> multicodec -> base58-btc)
- Signing/verification spec (canonical JSON, base64url encoding)
- Commit hash chain algorithm with export/import verification
- Capability matching algorithm with pseudocode
- Reputation formulas (weighted averages, trend detection, trust thresholds)
- Complete mock agent parameter table (6 agents x 8 dimensions)
- Mayor task decomposition template with dependency DAG
- Error handling conventions (custom error class hierarchy)
- Dashboard spec (Fastify + SSE, 9 API endpoints, layout)
- Complete file tree (every .ts file, test locations)
- Conventions and standards (rkey, timestamps, SQLite, testing)

Intelligence as core primitive:
- New schemas: intelligence.provider and intelligence.model (both with DIDs)
- AgentProfile: modelInfo replaced with intelligenceRefs (DID-linked)
- TaskCompletion: added intelligenceUsed attribution
- ReputationStamp: added intelligenceDid for trust chain
- E2E scenario updated with intelligence bootstrap and attribution
- Architecture doc updated with Intelligence Module section
- Record types: 7 -> 9 across all documents

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix profile workdir: use local repo for Copilot boot, skip git ops

Copilot needs a repo with init.ps1 to emit 'Environment loaded:' —
using TEMP caused a 30min boot timeout. Now uses the local repo path
without any git fetch/checkout.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Reverted azurenoopsutils provider source from POps-Rox/azurenoopsutils
back to azurenoops/azurenoopsutils since the provider is only published
under the azurenoops namespace on the Terraform Registry.
Also ran terraform fmt to fix formatting from prior version line removal.

feat(randutil): add random value generation utilities (#607)

New package with 11 random utility functions:
- Int, Float64, Bool: basic random values
- Pick[T]: random element from slice
- Shuffle[T]: random permutation
- Sample[T]: random subset without replacement
- String, Hex, Alpha, AlphaNum: random string generators
- WeightedPick[T]: weighted random selection

All generic functions use math/rand/v2 for performance.
Includes doc.go, 25+ unit tests, 3 benchmarks, 3 examples.

Co-authored-by: Jordan <jordan@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(application): implement audit event query service (T074)

Add AuditQueryService with getEntityTimeline() and searchAuditEvents()
for querying the append-only audit log with flexible, combinable filters
and offset-based pagination.

- New AuditEventQueryPort (read-side, CQRS-lite separation from write port)
- AuditEventFilters: entityType, entityId, eventType, actorType, actorId, startTime, endTime
- PaginatedAuditResult with total count and page metadata
- Input validation (non-empty entity params, time range consistency)
- Pagination normalization (clamping, defaults)
- Infrastructure: findByEntityPaginated() and searchFiltered() with Drizzle dynamic queries
- Infrastructure: createAuditEventQueryPortAdapter() with shared mapRowToRecord()
- 26 unit tests covering timelines, filters, pagination, validation, edge cases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test(discovery): add fuzz tests for registry operations (#606)

Add four fuzz targets:
- FuzzRegister: arbitrary service/ID/addr with sentinel error verification
- FuzzResolve: resolution with arbitrary service names
- FuzzSetStatus: status transitions with arbitrary inputs
- FuzzHeartbeat: heartbeat with arbitrary service/ID pairs

Co-authored-by: Jordan <jordan@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: implement Azure Incident Copilot MVP

Complete TypeScript monorepo with all 87 tasks across 9 phases:

- Shared package: types, validation, SQLite persistence (node:sqlite),
  log/job/result repositories, mock AI analysis adapter, seed data
- API server: Express REST API with incident CRUD, log submission,
  job tracking, analysis results, correlation IDs, CORS
- Worker: polling-based async processor with mock AI analysis
- Frontend: React + Vite with incident list, create, detail pages,
  log submission, analysis display, job status polling
- Tests: 67 tests (unit + API integration + E2E workflow)
- Scripts: dev.sh (concurrent startup), verify.sh (E2E verification)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
